+ back to AI Banner Creator Workflow
AI Banner Creator Workflow

Step 07 — Model Styling

The GPT recommends model styling that supports the product and the conversion angle: model profile (age range and vibe), clothing chosen for contrast and clarity, hair styling relevant to product usage, minimal accessories only if helpful. Styling here is functional, not decorative — it supports visibility of use, believability, and conversion clarity. Iterate if you have brand guidelines or a specific look in mind.
